---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
Describe the workflow friction or missing capability. Start with "I was trying to..." or "Every time I..."

**Describe your ideal solution**
What would the command or behavior look like?

**Alternatives you've considered**
Any workarounds you're currently using.

**Additional context**
Screenshots, example `.env.example` files, or links to related tools.
